summary: Notification badge feature tested successfully. All backend APIs pass, UI badge displays correctly on Messages tab and updates when reading messages.

issues: EXPO_USE_FAST_RESOLVER causes bundling issues with relative imports - temporarily disabled during testing but restored after

seed_data_creation: Created test users (test_badge_ui@example.com, badge_sender_*@example.com) and test messages for badge testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badge feature fully working. Backend: GET /api/messages/unread-count and POST /api/messages/mark-read/{user_id} both working. Frontend: BadgeContext refreshes on 30s interval, badge shows on Messages tab, badge disappears after opening conversation. Note: When testing with shared requests.Session(), cookie-based auth can cause issues - use separate sessions per user.

backend_apis: POST /api/messages/mark-read/{other_user_id} - marks messages as read, returns count
Authentication required for both endpoints (401 without auth)
Mark-read only affects messages FROM specific sender TO current user
Count only includes unread messages TO current user (not FROM)
frontend_ui: Badge shows red circle with count on Messages tab icon
Badge updates when opening a conversation (mark-read triggers)
Badge shows '99+' when count exceeds 99 (code review verified)
